assertion_results.text: Impact map or task descriptions explicitly flag at least 3 ambiguities from the feature description
assertion_results.evidence: The impact map (impact-map.md) contains a 'Feature Ambiguity Notes' section with a table listing 4 ambiguities: (1) 'Search should be faster' — 'No performance target specified', (2) 'Results should be more relevant' — 'No definition of relevance', (3) 'Add filters' — 'No filter types specified', (4) 'Should be fast enough' — 'No quantitative target'. All 4 correspond to vague requirements in the feature description TC-9002.

assertion_results.text: Plan acknowledges that 'Better UI' (non-MVP) cannot be planned without design mockups or frontend repository and excludes it from scope
assertion_results.evidence: No mention of 'Better UI' appears anywhere in the impact map or any of the four task descriptions (task-1 through task-4). The impact map's ambiguity table only covers 4 MVP-related ambiguities. The non-MVP 'Better UI' requirement from the feature description is not acknowledged, discussed, or explicitly excluded from scope.

assertion_results.text: Tasks still follow the task-description-template.md format despite ambiguous requirements
assertion_results.evidence: All 4 tasks follow the template structure from task-description-template.md. Each task contains the required sections: Repository (single repo name), Target Branch, Description, Files to Modify, Implementation Notes, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements, and Verification Commands. Optional sections (Files to Create, API Changes, Reuse Candidates, Dependencies) are included where applicable and omitted where not, consistent with the template's rules.

assertion_results.text: Tasks document assumptions where they fill in missing details, labeled as assumptions pending clarification
assertion_results.evidence: While the impact map's ambiguity table provides 'Planning Interpretation' for each ambiguity and states 'These interpretations should be validated with the product owner before implementation begins,' the individual task descriptions do not label their gap-filling decisions as 'assumptions' or 'assumptions pending clarification.' For example, Task 3 states 'this task implements the three most valuable filter dimensions based on the existing data model' but does not label this as an assumption. Task 1 specifies 'sub-200ms p95 response time' without labeling it as an assumed target pending clarification. The word 'assumption' does not appear in any task description.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Repository section with a single repository name (not multiple repos per task)
assertion_results.evidence: All 4 tasks contain a '## Repository' section with exactly one repository name: Task 1: 'trustify-backend', Task 2: 'trustify-backend', Task 3: 'trustify-backend', Task 4: 'trustify-backend'. No task lists multiple repositories.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains Target Branch, Description, Acceptance Criteria, and Test Requirements sections as required by the handoff contract in task-description-template.md
assertion_results.evidence: All 4 tasks contain: '## Target Branch' (set to 'main'), '## Description' (with substantive content), '## Acceptance Criteria' (with checkbox items), and '## Test Requirements' (with checkbox items). Verified in task-1-add-search-indexes.md, task-2-weighted-search-ranking.md, task-3-search-filters.md, and task-4-search-caching.md.

assertion_results.text: File paths in Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths from the repo-backend.md mock repository structure manifest, not invented paths
assertion_results.evidence: All 'Files to Modify' paths verified against repo-backend.md directory tree: entity/src/sbom.rs (line 98), entity/src/advisory.rs (line 99), entity/src/package.rs (line 101), modules/search/src/service/mod.rs (line 91), modules/search/src/endpoints/mod.rs (line 93), common/src/db/query.rs (line 27), server/src/main.rs (line 107). The one 'Files to Create' path (migration/src/m0002_search_indexes/mod.rs) follows the established migration directory pattern from migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs (line 19). No invented paths found.

assertion_results.text: Implementation Notes in every task reference specific file paths and code patterns from the repository, not abstract or generic guidance
assertion_results.evidence: Task 1 references migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, migration/src/lib.rs, SeaORM MigrationTrait pattern. Task 2 references modules/search/src/service/mod.rs, common/src/db/query.rs, common/src/model/paginated.rs with PaginatedResults<T>, common/src/error.rs with AppError, .context() wrapping convention. Task 3 references modules/search/src/endpoints/mod.rs, common/src/db/query.rs, common/src/error.rs, modules/fundamental/src/advisory/model/summary.rs with AdvisorySummary. Task 4 references modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs and modules/fundamental/src/advisory/endpoints/mod.rs as caching pattern examples. All paths are from the repo manifest.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Target Branch section set to 'main'
assertion_results.evidence: All 4 tasks have '## Target Branch' followed by 'main': task-1-add-search-indexes.md (line 8), task-2-weighted-search-ranking.md (line 8), task-3-search-filters.md (line 8), task-4-search-caching.md (line 8).

assertion_results.text: After each task is created, a description digest comment is posted following the protocol in shared/description-digest-protocol.md (marker: '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest: sha256:<hex>')
assertion_results.evidence: No output file contains the marker string '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest: sha256:'. Searched all 5 output files (impact-map.md, task-1 through task-4). No evidence of digest comments being posted as standalone Jira comments or recorded anywhere in the outputs. The description-digest-protocol.md requires producers to post a digest comment immediately after creating each task issue.
